display_name: OpenSpec — Spec-Driven Development for AI Coding Assistants
description: OpenSpec (30.5K stars, MIT): Spec-Driven Development (SDD) framework for AI coding assistants. Workflow: /opsx:propose → /opsx:apply → /opsx:archive. Creates structured change proposals with proposal.md, specs/, design.md, tasks.md. Full documentation: CLI reference, commands, concepts, customization, workflows, multi-language support.
author: Fission-AI
workflow: propose → creates openspec/changes/{name}/{proposal.md, specs/, design.md, tasks.md} → apply → implements tasks → archive → moves to openspec/changes/archive/
notes: OpenSpec enforces spec-first development: write specs before code. Compatible with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, Gemini. Specs are human-readable markdown living in /openspec/. Iterative not waterfall. Built for brownfield AND greenfield.
